title: Ancient Structures: Chinese
description: A Chinese structure pack mod for the Ancient Structures serie
body:
## Ancient Structures: Chinese This mod is an extension from the [Ancient Structures](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ancient-cultural-structures) serie and add various structure inspired from China History into Minecraft. These structures adds customs mobs and various loots for the players to create a great experience. All the structures can be find in the Taiga and Oak forest biomes for now. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## About Ancient Structures [Ancient Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-structures) is a full-featured Minecraft mod that adds cultural, handcrafted structures from ancient civilizations directly into your world. It serves as a bridge within the Dawn of Time ecosystem, showcasing the architectural potential of Dawn of Time blocks and the animated armor models from Armor of the Ages through immersive world generation. The experience can be extended via the other structure mods from the Dawn of Time team. These packs are focused on a single culture to allow you to discover even more about architecture. Each pack is unique and reflects the team member style! * **[Knoxxturre](https://modrinth.com/user/Knoxxturre) :** Edo Japan * **[Jackiefr](https://modrinth.com/user/Jackiefr):** Chinese
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) **The mod requires the following dependencies to work :** * [Dawn of Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/dawn-of-time) * [Armor of the Ages](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-of-the-ages) * [Garden Trails](https://modrinth.com/mod/garden-trails) * [Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) * [YetAnotherConfig (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Our mods
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Credits * **Jackie** – Creator of the building pack set * **TheGoldenWorld** – Made this project into a mod * [Retro Diffusion](https://www.retrodiffusion.ai/) has been used to generate the logo of this page
